item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1729 (Baja hard time)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [beep] ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: This period in our history was inevitable
item.dc:creator: IMemesYouNoHarm
77thtimesthecharm

item.title: The Metal Dress Saga
item.description:
I've been doing an ongoing joke with this whole "Viral Dress" trend over on My YouTube, and finally did one where I actually wear the dress I am holding instead of undercutting it with a goofy joke (My Youtube has been a blast lately btw, been making shorts everyday, and my revenue from YouTube goes to Trans Charities - Consider subbing: https://www.youtube.com/@AlsoAshleyB
The Kafkaesque Nightmare - AKA the truth behind all these silly reels... behind... he... hehe
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.description:
https://www.ign.com/articles/peppa-pig-owner-hasbro-faces-backlash-after-reportedly-trying-to-force-child-actors-to-sign-away-ai-voice-rights
https://openletter.earth/open-letter-to-studios-and-producers-on-the-use-of-child-actors-voices-in-ai-0e5f1c37
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
"Have a nice day" Oh, no thank you."
I had a dream that I was driving a cop car but I was in the passenger seat sleeping with earplugs and an eye shade and got pulled over by actual cops but they had to let me go because I wasn't actually breaking any laws. ...so, same.
This is unrelated, but I just saw an episode of golden girls where Sophia was getting married and there were at least a dozen Elvis impersonators. I was all "that one looks kind of like Quentin Tarantino" AND IT WAS! Quentin Tarantino has a microscopic bit in the golden girls as an Elvis impersonator.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: This is looks just like a recurring childhood nightmare I used to have.
item.description: Video is from AccuWeather. When I was a kid, I used to have a recurring nightmare about a slow moving but huge tsunami wave coming in from the horizon, despite us living hundreds of miles from the ocean. I realize this is just wind pushing a bunch of clouds, but it is exactly what that recurring nightmare looked like. And now I'm curious what happens when that... front? passes over the observer with the camera.
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy

item.title: Maybe I should go to Sunday service after all ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
item.dc:creator: MyNameGifOreilly

item.title: Trans Galaxy makeup
item.description: I was inspired by my dear friend, NsomniaksDream. You can find her artwork here https://www.nsomniaksdream.com/. I've done the rainbow and the lesbian flag too thus far, just haven't uploaded them yet because I wanted to prioritise allyship with the trans community first. Happy Pride! Remember, the more we choose love and acceptance, the better the world becomes. You can play a piano with half the keys, but when played with all the keys, it's a more fulfilling and joyous harmony. The more candles we light, the brighter the room becomes. Love, as always, MCroft07. x
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: J.D. Vance compared apples to the orange one, Nixon to Trump, essentially says Watergate is peanuts compared to an administration that commits Watergate-level criminal acts every 12 hours. The idea that nothing has taken down this presidency is C-R-A-Z-Y.
item.description: I genuinely feel sorry for any shrink's couch JD Vance frequents.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: The magical woke machine is hidden inside flock cameras.
item.dc:creator: IMemesYouNoHarm

item.title: I am a lucky man
item.description: Changing remote work policies for leadership at the organization I work for but my family is rooted in our community and we aren't going to leave. Boss totally gets it; they (and others) are rallying around me to find my next position. Spouse has been nothing but supportive and encouraging. I've never felt more supported and, even though I'm dreading the search, I'm confident I'll find something. For the first time since I joined this site my username may not be true, though.
item.dc:creator: EmployedEnglishMajor

item.dc:creator: bippityboppitybuttsex

item.title: Dolly Parton's New Truck Stop Gas Station - told reporters that she "couldn't leave it to beavers" when asked about her decision to open a truck stop.
item.description:
Dolly Parton is now competing in the gas station industry, and Buc-ee's is to blame. Born in Locust Ridge, Tennessee, the Queen of Country is investing in her home state by opening a new gas station known as Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop. The first location held its grand opening ceremony on Thursday in Cornersville, Tennessee, where Parton cut the ribbon and said a few words about the business venture. "I'm sure some of you are wondering why I wanted a truck stop. Well, I couldn't leave it to beavers," Parton said at the ceremony. "I had to throw my scrawny little self in there. We're not trying to compete with anybody. We don't think we'll have to." Clearly, Parton took a few swings at the prolific, Texas-based gas station chain, Buc-ee's. But her comparison between Buc-ee's appears to be apt, as Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop features more than gas pumps. The travel center will feature a full-service restaurant, grab-and-go barbecue, and an ice cream counter. The station website also features a shopping section that indicates merchandise will be coming soon. Parton cited her extensive touring history as part of the reason behind her investment, too. With 12 headlining tours under her belt and over 70 years of musical appearances, Parton said she "spent her whole life traveling down the road." Plus, the truck stop will serve as a community center, with 52 musical and celebratory events already on the calendar.
https://www.roadandtrack.com/news/a71728622/dolly-partons-new-gas-station-buc-ees/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Can’t teach an old liberal dog…
item.description:
https://dallasexpress.com/national/13-moderate-democrats-reject-socialism-on-new-promise-to-america-pledge/
In the days following the NY primary, Zohran got his rent freeze approved, which is yet another one of his promises kept, and the corporately owned capitalist wing of the party… made some weird pledge to fight back against him… When we on the left say the liberals will spend more time fighting us than the right, we mean it. Where’s the pledge to fight oligarchs? Or homelessness, or to save the planet, end wars, to end police brutality? No where to be seen. But to fight back against the socialists, well that’s gotta happen immediately.
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: GovBrief Today #511
item.description: Barack Obama said elections have consequences, and today the Supreme Court proved it again. Senate Republicans refused to let Obama fill a court vacancy during his second term and held it open for a year, then handed it to Trump, who filled it and named two more. That refusal created the 6 to 3 majority now ruling on the country's biggest questions. Four years ago this week, that majority took a basic right from every woman in the country when it overturned Roe. Today it ruled that people fleeing for their lives can be turned back at the border before they ever set foot on American soil, with no right to even ask for asylum. The Statue of Liberty still invites the world to send us its tired and its poor. This court just told them not to bother. I've emailed 7,974 stories over 511 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260625-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/phillips-exits [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june25 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/blanche-epstein [4] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-usps [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ombudsman-sues [6] https://go.govbrief.today/nyc-rent-freeze [7] https://go.govbrief.today/openai-limited [8] https://go.govbrief.today/dea-fentanyl [9] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-monsanto [10] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-guns [11] https://go.govbrief.today/tenn-ice-blocked [12] https://go.govbrief.today/florda-alcatraz [13] https://go.govbrief.today/child-deport-alert [14] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-asylum [15] https://go.govbrief.today/student-loan-rules [16] https://go.govbrief.today/fcc-erate [17] https://go.govbrief.today/kean-fundraiser [18] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-war [19] https://go.govbrief.today/pool-testimony Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.description: EDIT: Friday Frontpage! Thank you Imgurians! I make reviews as a hobby, and this week I experimented an exquisite yet weird meal... "My Dinner with Andre" If you want me to... Tell you more, this is the link https://youtu.be/8Zs4p1C3wTE
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Buddy Gator - Happy 6th Birthday
item.description: Thank you for all the love and support over the past 6 years. Throughout this journey, we've faced challenges and difficult moments, but together we've overcome them. I'm truly grateful to everyone who has been part of Buddy Gator's story. I hope Buddy Gator will continue to grow and share many more adventures with you in the years to come. Thank you for being here and for being part of this journey. Love you all.
item.dc:creator: BuddyGator
